candidate_definition_hints.text: A consolidated series of readiness checklists, SOPs, and peacetime prep guides. Intended for civilian use in Israel. Non-official, but based on gov resources.
A comprehensive field guide and checklist system for civilian preparedness during wartime in Israel.
